II-2 Ex. (210)
RURAL DEVELOPMENT AND PANCHAYAT RAJ DEPARTMENT
RESERVATION OF SEATS IN DISTRICT PANCHAYATS FOR THE PERSONS BELONGING TO THE SCHEDULED
CASTES AND SCHEDULED TRIBES AND FOR WOMEN UNDER THE TAMIL NADU PANCHAYATS ACT, 1994.
[G.O. (Ms.) No. 105, Rural Development and Panchayat Raj (PR-1) Department, 16th September 2016,
ÝõE 31, ¶¡ºA, F¼õœÀõ˜ Ý‡´-2047.]
No. II(2)/RDPR/640(b-1)/2016
Under Section 32 of the Tamil Nadu Panchayats Act, 1994 (Tamil Nadu Act 21 of 1994), the Governor of
Tamil Nadu hereby reserves the seats for the persons belonging to the Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes
and for Women in District Panchayats as specified in the Table below:-

SCHEDULED CASTES AND SCHEDULED TRIBES AND FOR WOMEN UNDER TAMIL NADU 
PANCHAYATS ACT, 1994.
G.O. Ms. No.106, Rural Development and Panchayat Raj (PR-1) Department, Dated:16.09.2016
Mtâ 31, J‹K», ÂUtŸSt® M©L 2047
Under section 20 of the Tamil Nadu Panchayats Act, 1994 (Tamil Nadu Act 21 of 1994), the
Governor of Tamil Nadu hereby reserves the seats for the persons belonging to the Scheduled
Castes and the Scheduled Tribes and for women in the Wards of Panchayat Union Councils as
specified in the Table below:-
